claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a mix of prose and verse, with the herbal section being primarily composed of short, rhyming couplets.
evidence_for: The herbal section has higher entropy levels compared to other sections
The word-final glyph distribution in the herbal section shows a higher frequency of 'y' and 'n', which are common in rhyming couplets
test: Run a chi-squared test on the word-final glyph distribution in the herbal section compared to other sections
